mapper.select: INSERT INTO data_record (page_code, data, status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{pageCode}, #{dataJson}::jsonb, #{status}, #{operator}, #{operator}) RETURNING id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM data_record WHERE id = #{id} AND page_code = #{pageCode}
mapper.select: SELECT id, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, data FROM data_record WHERE id = #{id} AND page_code = #{pageCode} LIMIT 1
